name: Party Mushrooms-Spinach
recipeIngredient: 1 can condensed cream of chicken soup (10 3/4 oz.),
2 packages frozen creamed spinach (9 oz. each),
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and pat dry fresh mushrooms, or drain canned mushrooms.
2. In a large skillet, melt 5 tablespoons butter. Add the mushrooms; sauté for 5 minutes.
3. Stir in the chicken soup, milk, spinach, and black pepper.
4. Cook until the mixture reaches boiling point.
5. Pour into a 2-quart casserole dish.
6. In a small saucepan, melt the remaining 1 tablespoon butter. Stir in the croutons.
7. Sprinkle over the casserole.
8. Bake uncovered in a preheated moderate oven at 375 degrees until hot and bubbly, about 5 minutes.
